changes.summary: Added NotificationRoutingRowSchema and NotificationRoutingSchema (47 rows, exhaustive vs NotificationTypeSchema) alongside existing NotificationTypeSchema re-exports for Option B subpath.

Phase 1 scaffold: NOTIFICATION_CLIENT_LEGACY_MATRIX (47 types from NotificationsClient/buildRedirectUrl), NOTIFICATION_ROUTING_ROWS/MATRIX parsed via NotificationRoutingSchema, and assertNotificationRoutingParity for Track B gate.

notes: Track B co-located spec at web/src/features/notifications/routing-matrix.test.ts (companion to write_set scaffold; not imported by runtime). subtitleKey/linkPattern values encode NotificationsClient structured branches, formatNotificationMessage keys, and NotificationService.buildRedirectUrl template ids.
